title: Ḑank Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Ḑank with a Z-Score of +7.00. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Ḑank is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 23.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is very low at 9%, while the wind speed is moderate at 25.3 km/h. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the situation is critical.
